Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Musculoskeletal care18-Mar-2025Osteoarthritis of knee (disorder)
  • Reduce knee pain severity to improve mobility and quality of life
  • Increase ability to perform daily activities such as walking and climbing stairs
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week
Diabetes self management plan19-Aug-2007Prediabetes (finding)
  • Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% through diabetes self-management.
  • Achieve and maintain a 5% reduction in body weight to reduce diabetes risk.
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of diabetes self-management.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension11-Jun-1995Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Patient will demonstrate understanding of lifestyle modifications to manage blood pressure, including diet, exercise, and medication adherence.
